ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code for the county */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each county */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the county is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of health metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the health metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of demographic metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of economic metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the educational metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of educational metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of employment metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_coverage_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health coverage metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health coverage metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health coverage metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of health coverage metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial composition metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial composition metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racial composition metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of racial composition metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the household metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the household metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of household metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age distribution metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the age distribution metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age distribution metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of age distribution metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, data analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality event */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county whose data was validated */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator who performed the validation */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validators" (
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validator */,
  "validator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the validator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the validator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the validator (e.g., data analyst, quality assurance) */,
  "validator_type" TEXT /* Type of validator (e.g., data analyst, quality assurance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validator_id")
)
